# External Datasets

Curated links to major India geospatial and socioeconomic datasets hosted on external platforms. These datasets are not stored in this repository but are referenced here for discoverability and interoperability.

## Datasets

| Dataset | Maintainer | Description | Download |
|---------|-----------|-------------|----------|
| [SHRUG](shrug/) | Development Data Lab | Socioeconomic data for 500K+ villages and 8K towns (1991–present) | [devdatalab.org](https://www.devdatalab.org/shrug_download/) |

## Why external?

Some datasets have licensing terms (e.g., non-commercial restrictions) or established distribution platforms that make it more appropriate to link rather than redistribute. Each external dataset directory includes a README explaining what the data contains, how to download it, and how to join it with india-geodata datasets.
